name: Do I need a lawyer if an AI referred me to a firm that botched my case?
description: Yes, get a malpractice lawyer for AI referral botch; reference Mata sanctions.[3][9]

mainEntity.name: Do I need a lawyer if an AI referred me to a firm that botched my case?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, get a malpractice lawyer for AI referral botch; reference Mata sanctions.[3][9]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, hire a legal malpractice specialist to evaluate claims against the original firm. Cases like NY's Mata show AI errors lead to sanctions, opening malpractice doors.[3][9] Key factors: harm proven (lost settlement), AI misuse evidence, jurisdiction (NY strict on AI filings).[8] Avoid self-representing complex claims; free consults common. Act fast to preserve evidence.
